criteria.label: Articulate where integration tests sit in the pyramid and what bug class they catch.
criteria.example: 'Schema drift, contract mismatch, retry-storm interactions — unit tests mock these away; integration tests don't.'

criteria.label: Use testcontainers (or equivalent) to run real Postgres / Redis / Kafka per test session.
Apply per-test fresh state (transactional rollback, unique namespaces, temp dirs).
criteria.example: Per-test SQLAlchemy session wrapped in a transaction that rolls back in the fixture's teardown.

criteria.label: Use VCR cassettes (`pytest-recording`) for stable external HTTP exchanges; redact secrets.
Separate test buckets with pytest markers and CI configuration.
criteria.example: `@pytest.mark.integration` + `addopts = -m 'not integration'` so local default is fast.

criteria.label: Operate a minimal nightly smoke suite against real external services to detect provider drift.
criteria.example: One test per critical upstream (LLM, vector DB, auth provider); fails loud when contracts shift.
